programs.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programs.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: Alynne ropes the team into a triplex renovation with her friend Octavian, who is in way over his head. A good deal with huge profit potential quickly turns into a costly venture due to Octavian's ways.

programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Rachael shows how to make a hearty beef stew that is both versatile and delicious and serves it with her mother's famous 'pucky huddle' potato fries.

programs.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programs.desc: After dinner at the Luang Prabang Bamboo Restaurant, the Dokbakz head back to their accommodation, only to find that the entrance has turned into a flooded mess from the heavy rain.

programs.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programs.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: Alynne ropes the team into a triplex renovation with her friend Octavian, who is in way over his head. A good deal with huge profit potential quickly turns into a costly venture due to Octavian's ways.
